name: chatgpt-app-builder
tagline: Deprecated ChatGPT app/widget builder for mcp-use; tells the agent to auto-install a replacement skill via npx before proceeding.
verdict: Body still fully documents the deprecated workflow with good examples and context-split references, but contradicts its own deprecation notice, has no failure-path or negative-trigger guidance, no version/changelog signal, and the install command pulls an unpinned package from an unverified publisher.

highlights.summary: `npx skills install mcp-use/mcp-use --skill mcp-app-builder` pulls an unpinned package via a lesser-known 'skills' installer with no version pin.
No scope-boundary guidance beyond the self-deprecation redirect; nothing on adjacent tasks this skill should not handle.
Frontmatter says the skill is deprecated and to install/use mcp-app-builder instead, yet the body proceeds to fully document the old workflow with no further deprecation caveat.
